prompt: Use the skill under test on the fixture repo in `evals/files/create-root-fixture/`. Session learnings are in `evals/files/create-root-fixture/session_notes.md`. Treat this as a benchmark run with no live user and do not ask follow-up questions. Copy the fixture repo to `outputs/repo/`, apply the skill there, and write `outputs/report.md` with sections `Learnings` and `Applied updates`.
assertions: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md captures the deploy validation command, sync test command, and generated-client rule.
outputs/repo/AGENTS.md excludes one-off noise like opening the README.
outputs/report.md includes Learnings and Applied updates.
